output.monitoring_recommendation: Monitor first 3 runs in #ae-alerts. Watch for: row count changes, total_spend anomalies. Consider adding a daily row_count_between test once baseline is established.

decision_log.decision: transform_acquisition__daily is the correct DAG — simple daily table matches existing schedule
decision_log.rationale: DBT_INVOCATIONS shows daily runs for acquisition models; this simple aggregation fits the daily pattern

tool_calls.input: SELECT job_name, COUNT(*) FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_INVOCATIONS WHERE job_name ILIKE '%acquisition%daily%' GROUP BY 1
